text:
is a Japanese director, animator, storyboarder and illustrator, born on 14 March 1963 in Yonago, Tottori Prefecture.

He was not directly involved with the original Evangelion anime, besides designing two Angels, Gaghiel and Israfel, but became heavily involved with the latter Rebuild of Evangelion films. Evangelion 3.0+1.0 Assorted Translations 

Works

Theatrical Films

Brave Story (2006) - Storyboard, Unit Director, Animation
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Design, Key Animation
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Director, Storyboard, Design, Image Board, Key Animation, Screenplay Cooperation
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Director, Storyboard, Art Setting, Concept Art Director, Key Animation

TV Anime/OVA

Route 20 - Galactic Airport (1991) - Director, Screenplay
Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Design Assistant (eps 8, 9)
Blue Submarine No.6 (OVA) (1998) - Director, Storyboard (eps 1, 2, 4), Art, Mechanical design, Art design, Key Animation (eps 1, 2, 4)
Final Fantasy: Unlimited (2001) - Director, Storyboard (eps 4, 13, 16), Character Design
Second Renaissance (Animatrix) (2003) - Chief Director, Character Design, Animation Director
Gankutsuou: The Count of Monte Cristo (2004) - Director, Scenario (eps 1, 12-24), Storyboard (8 episodes), Episode Director (ep 24), Original Character Design, Key Animation (OP, ED; 9 episodes)
Shin Godzilla (2016) - Storyboard, Godzilla Image Design, Image Board
Imageboards by Mahiro Maeda (2021) - Storyboard, Design, Image Board, Key Animation, Screenplay Cooperation
EVANGELION: 3.0 (-46h) (2023) - Storyboard
Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX (2025) - Design Works, Storyboard, Detail Works

Published works

EVANGELION 3.0 (-120 min.) (2021) - Illustrator
Zatsu Maeda Mahiro Zatsu Gashū - Illustrator

External Links
